high_priority_findings.finding: OUTCOME_CALLBACK_GAP: 10 graduated rules have times_applied > 0 but times_correct = 0. This means record_outcome() is not being called on trade close for non-veto rules. The VETO_CF_WIRE (applied prior run) fixes this for graduated_rule_veto skip paths only. Regular rule outcomes (confidence boosts/penalties) still never feed back to times_correct. Rules cannot auto-retire at 35% accuracy because accuracy is never measured.
high_priority_findings.action: Find outcome registration in decision_engine.py or coordinator.py. Wire trade result (win/loss pct) to GraduatedRulesEngine.record_outcome() on trade close. Separate from veto wire — this affects active trade rules, not just veto skips.
